title: Theories of the media and influences on media content
summary: 9699 — Marxist, pluralist, and postmodern media theories; ownership and agenda-setting.
learningObjectives: Compare pluralist and Marxist views of media power.
Analyse news values and ideological bias.
Evaluate postmodern and cultural studies approaches.

simpleExplanation.title: Who controls the message?
simpleExplanation.summary: Pluralists see diverse media voices; Marxists see ruling-class ideology; others emphasise audience negotiation of meaning.

sections.content: **Media theories** (9.2) is core Paper 4. Pair **Curran & Seaton** with **GUMG** studies.
